output.sparql:
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?player ?playerLabel(COUNT(?event) AS ?lossCount) WHERE {
  ?event wdt:P361 wd:Q837 .
  ?event rdfs:label ?eventLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?eventLabel) = 'en')
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(?eventLabel) , "women's singles") || CONTAINS(LCASE(?eventLabel) , "ladies' singles")) MINUS {
    ?event wdt:P1344 ?player .
  }
  ?event wdt:P1345 ?player .
  ?player wdt:P21 wd:Q6581097 .
  ?player rdfs:label ?playerLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?playerLabel) = 'en')
}
GROUP BY ?player ?playerLabel
HAVING(?lossCount >= 3 && ?lossCount <= 7)
ORDER BY DESC(?lossCount)

FILTER(LANG(?playerLabel) = 'en') } GROUP BY ?player ?playerLabel HAVING (?lossCount >= 3 && ?lossCount <= 7) ORDER BY DESC(?lossCount)
